Name:  Morgan,Laurie E                Unit No:   a29a2c09-5400-da62-b30e-f84e09cf9c1a

Admission Date:  1979-01-30              Discharge Date:   1977-08-20

Date of Birth:  1990-11-06             Sex:   M

Service: CARDIOTHORACIC

Allergies:
Patient recorded as having No Known Allergies to Drugs

Attending:Kara
Addendum:
Once on the floor Mr Jessica Bowman was noted to have periods of
intermittent atrial fibrilation that was treated with Beta
blockers and Amiodarone following which he converted to Sinus
rhythm. On POD 5 the patient was noted to have a fever and found
to have a right arm iv infiltrated. This was treated with oral
antibiotics and warm compresses to the arm, after 2 days the
swelling and erythema had resolved and it was decided the
patient was ready for discharge to home with visiting nurses. he
is follow up w/wound clinic in 2 weeks, w/Dr Justin in 4 weeks,
with Drs Brady and [**Name5 (PTitle) 2523**] in 05-04 weeks.
Medications and history as per previous summary

Discharge Disposition:
Home With Service

Facility:
Larkin Community Hospital Behavioral Health Services VNA

                             Gary Fitzgerald Jessica Anderson MD 79539

Completed by:1977-08-20
